infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow SenTihNel to use speech recognition.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow SenTihNel to use the microphone.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SenTihNel uses the camera to stream live video to your fleet during an SOS emergency.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SenTihNel needs your location in the background to share your position with your fleet during an emergency.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SenTihNel needs your location to share your position with your fleet during an emergency.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SenTihNel needs your location in the background to share your position with your fleet during an emergency.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SenTihNel to access your camera for security.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SenTihNel to hear the wake word.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: SenTihNel needs your location in the background to track you during an emergency.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: SenTihNel needs your location in the background to track you during an emergency.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: SenTihNel needs your location to track you during an emergency.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SenTihNel to use the microphone.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow SenTihNel to use speech recognition.
